description: Forgejo-platform overrides. Forgejo Actions don't populate the commit-status API that Renovate's prCreation:not-pending reads (GET /commits/{sha}/status is empty even on green CI), so not-pending never resolves and PRs hang the full prNotPendingHours. Force immediate PR creation on the Forgejo path. force: because consumers extend :default (not-pending) at the repo level, which only an admin-level force overrides.
